tool_description.description: Execute a specialized cybersecurity skill script from the built-in library. Use this tool to run pre-built automation scripts (like XSS scanners, SQLi validators, etc.) instead of writing custom Python code. The scripts are maintained in the 'skills' directory and are optimized for specific vulnerability testing.

parameter.name: skill_name
parameter.description: The name of the skill category (e.g., 'testing-for-xss-vulnerabilities').

parameter.name: script_name
parameter.description: The specific script file to execute (e.g., 'xss_scanner.py').

parameter.name: arguments
parameter.description: Arguments to pass to the script (e.g., '--url http://target.com/search?q=test').
